envFiles.content:
NODE_ENV=development
PORT=4000

# MongoDB
MONGO_URI=mongodb://localhost:27017/reddog_db

# JWT
JWT_SECRET=your_super_secret_jwt_key_here
JWT_EXPIRES_IN=7d

# Cloudinary (for file uploads)
CLOUDINARY_CLOUD_NAME=your_cloud_name
CLOUDINARY_API_KEY=your_api_key
CLOUDINARY_API_SECRET=your_api_secret

# SMTP / Email (stubbed — fill in to enable real sending)
SMTP_HOST=smtp.gmail.com
SMTP_PORT=587
SMTP_USER=your_email@gmail.com
SMTP_PASS=your_app_password
SMTP_FROM=noreply@reddogradios.com

# OpenAI (stubbed — fill in to enable real AI generation)
OPENAI_API_KEY=your_openai_key_here

# CORS
CORS_ORIGIN=http://localhost:5000

NODE_ENV=development
PORT=4000

# MongoDB
MONGO_URI=mongodb://localhost:27017/reddog_db

# JWT
JWT_SECRET=your_super_secret_jwt_key_here
JWT_EXPIRES_IN=7d

# Cloudinary (for file uploads)
CLOUDINARY_CLOUD_NAME=your_cloud_name
CLOUDINARY_API_KEY=your_api_key
CLOUDINARY_API_SECRET=your_api_secret

# SMTP / Email (Gmail)
SMTP_HOST=smtp.gmail.com
SMTP_PORT=587
SMTP_SECURE=false
SMTP_USER=sootharjai@gmail.com
SMTP_PASS=ypoxqmxchobgwwei
SMTP_FROM=sootharjai@gmail.com
ADMIN_EMAIL=sootharjai@gmail.com
FRONTEND_URL=http://localhost:3000

# OpenAI (stubbed — fill in to enable real AI generation)
OPENAI_API_KEY=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

# Dev email redirect — all emails go here in development
# DEV_REDIRECT_EMAIL=iamjaisuthar@gmail.com

# CORS
CORS_ORIGIN=http://localhost:3000

# Red Dog Radios Frontend — Environment Variables
# Copy this file to .env.local and fill in values

# Node environment (development | production | test)
NODE_ENV=development

# Red Dog Radios Frontend — Local Environment Variables
#
# This file is for local dev only. Do NOT commit it.
# Backend is accessed via Next.js rewrite: /api/* -> ${API_ORIGIN}/api/*
#
# Example:
# API_ORIGIN=http://localhost:4000

# Backend origin (no trailing slash)
API_ORIGIN=http://localhost:4000

# Optional: if you prefer using a public env var (not required with the rewrite)
# NEXT_PUBLIC_API_ORIGIN=http://localhost:4000

# Replit domain (optional, used in next.config.ts for allowed dev origins)
REPLIT_DEV_DOMAIN=
